name: Title IV Student Financial Aid
description: Requirements for institutions participating in federal student financial aid programs
penalty_authority: Fine and suspension from Title IV programs

requirements.title: Consumer Information Disclosure
requirements.description: Institution must make available to enrolled and prospective students information about student body diversity, retention rates, and graduation rates

requirements.title: Refund Policy Disclosure
requirements.description: Institution must disclose refund policies for returning unearned tuition, fees, and room and board

requirements.title: Administrative Capability
requirements.description: Institution must demonstrate administrative capability including adequate staffing and record-keeping

requirements.title: Standards of Administrative Capability
requirements.description: Institution must administer Title IV programs in accordance with all statutory and regulatory requirements

requirements.title: Return of Title IV Funds (R2T4)
requirements.description: Institution must return unearned Title IV funds when a student withdraws
